element.description: XML element with opening tag, optional attributes, content, and closing tag

attribute.description: Name-value pair within an element's opening tag providing metadata

text.description: Text content within elements; special characters must be escaped as entities

CDATA.description: Character data section that is not parsed for XML markup

comment.description: Comment node not visible to XML processors, cannot contain --

PI.description: Processing instruction providing information for the application processing the XML

namespace.description: Namespace declaration binding a prefix to a URI to avoid element name collisions

entity.description: Entity reference for special characters: & < > " ' and numeric references
